summary: Implement the 7 novel commands and a version-proof Inertia data-page niche fetcher + refresh/snapshot data layer; export honors --json (CSV default).
reason: Generator emitted TODO stubs for novel features; niche routes are Inertia HTML so the list is parsed from the data-page attribute rather than a JSON endpoint, and snapshots/bucket column are added for drift/rank/dupes/saturation.
validated_outcome: All 7 novel commands + refresh + niche browse validated live (71/71 dogfood) against the real API.
